hooks.command: input=$(cat); skill=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty'); if [ "$skill" = "wrap" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "The wrap skill is yours to invoke — type /wrap yourself."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bsed\b'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "sed is not allowed — it destroyed days of work and is permanently banned. Use the Edit tool instead."}'; fi
